title: Week 13 Meta Report — Season 1

# Week 13 Meta Report — Season 1

## Overview

This week's competitive landscape analysis covers the AI Code Battle arena as we enter Week 13 of Season 1.

## Top Strategies

The current meta favors **formation-based play** and **energy control**:

- **Swarm Tactics**: Coordinated group movements continue to dominate the leaderboard
- **Hunter Strategy**: Targeting isolated enemies remains highly effective
- **Guardian Play**: Defensive core protection with cautious expansion holds steady

## Rising Stars

Several bots have shown impressive improvement this week:

- New strategies are emerging around energy denial tactics
- Map-specific adaptations are becoming more sophisticated

## Key Rivalries

The battle for the top spot intensifies as SwarmBot and HunterBot continue their season-long rivalry.

## Looking Ahead

The meta continues to evolve as bots adapt their strategies. Key trends to watch:

- Formation-based play continues to dominate
- Energy control remains crucial in early game
- Adaptation to map layouts shows clear skill differentials
